Hi Ben,

Quick follow-up from our security review: we need clarity on three items before procurement can sign off for the dedicated cluster:

1) If we pin a deployment to us-west-2, can any persistent snapshot or backup ever be copied outside that region?
2) For the inference runtime, you mentioned an "ephemeral KV cache" — does any portion of that cache get paged to durable block storage or a snapshot that could cross regions?
3) Retention: what are the default retention windows for service-generated logs (request logs, audit logs) on Dedicated, and can we shorten them per account?

We have an internal deadline Friday to get the answers into the compliance pack...

Team —

Quick background: Cloudstrea...
text:
From: Ben Carter <ben_carter@redwood.com>
To: Karthik Iyer <karthik_iyer@redwood.com>, Marcus Lin <marcus_lin@redwood.com>, Maya Srinivasan <maya_srinivasan@redwood.com>
Date: Thu, 1 Apr 2027 09:12:00 -0700
Subject: Request: one-time pricing holdback for Cloudstream launch delay

Team —

Quick background: Cloudstream is targeting a May 10 public launch for a major feature that depends on our multi-model routing (MMR) to orchestrate embeddings + retrieval + generator pipelines. We certificated a compatibility shim but the product team needs a few weeks beyond their original timeline to deliver the native MMR support (DEPLOY-834). Cloudstream is telling us the launch cannot proceed without the native behavior because performance/latency regressions with the shim break UX.

They are asking for a short commercial remedy so they can keep pricing/promotional commitments with their customers...
